---
title: "Title of the book"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
author:
- "Author"
- "Affiliation"
- "Address"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  bookdown::pdf_book:
    includes:
      in_header: fmt/preamble.tex
      before_body: fmt/start.tex
      after_body: fmt/end.tex
    keep_tex: yes
    latex_engine: xelatex
    citation_package: natbib
papersize: a4
fontsize: 12pt
linestretch: 1.5
subparagraph: yes
toc-depth: 2
secnumdepth: 3
lof: True
lot: True
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
biblio-style: apalike
bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
geometry: "left=4cm, right=3cm, top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm"
---


```{r global_options, include=FALSE}
# Load packages
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stargazer)
library(writer)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidygraph)
library(ggraph)
library(DiagrammeR)
# Set global options
Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL","English")
options(
  scipen=999,
  knitr.kable.NA = ''
)
set.seed(105)
```
